lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَفِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿahdihī wafiyy

translation.en: O He who is faithful in His covenant

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي وَفَائِهِ قَوِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī wafāʾihī qawiyy

translation.en: O He who is strong in His faithfulness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī quwwatihī ʿaliyy

translation.en: O He who is exalted in His power

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوِّهِ قَرِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿuluwwihī qarīb

translation.en: O He who is near despite His exaltedness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُرْبِهِ لَطِيفٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī qurbihī laṭīf

translation.en: O He who is subtle in His nearness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī luṭfihī sharīf

translation.en: O He who is noble in His subtlety

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī sharafihī ʿazīz

translation.en: O He who is mighty in His nobility

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿizzihī ʿaẓīm

translation.en: O He who is great in His might

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿaẓamatihī majīd

translation.en: O He who is glorious in His greatness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مَجْدِهِ حَمِيدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī majdihī ḥamīd

translation.en: O He who is praiseworthy in His glory

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Sufficient for those who seek sufficiency from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden yeterlilik isteyene kâfi olan

translation.en: O Guide for those who seek guidance from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden hidayet isteyene yol gösteren

translation.en: O Protector of those who seek His protection
O Guardian of those who seek His guardianship
O Healer of those who seek healing from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden şifa isteyene şifa veren

translation.en: O Judge for those who seek His judgment
O Enricher of those who seek richness from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden zenginlik isteyeni zengin kılan

translation.en: O Fulfiller for those who seek fulfillment from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden ödeme isteyene tam ödeyen

translation.en: O Strengthener of those who seek strength from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden kuvvet isteyene güç veren

translation.en: O Patron of those who seek His patronage
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden velayet isteyenin velisi olan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Beloved of those who endear themselves to Him
O Physician of those who seek remedy from Him
O Near to those who draw near to Him
O Watcher over those who wait expectantly for Him
O Answerer of those who supplicate to Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine yalvaranların duasını kabul eden

translation.en: O Reckoner for those who rely on Him
O Granter to those who turn to Him
O Overcomer of those who face His punishment
translation.tr: Ey azabına maruz kalanları mağlup eden

lines.arabic: يَا دَلِيلَ مَنْ تَحَيَّرَ فِي أَمْرِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā dalīla man taḥayyara fī amrih

translation.en: O Guide for those who are perplexed in their affairs
translation.tr: Ey işinde şaşkına dönenin yol göstericisi

translation.en: O Companion of those who seek His intimacy

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O Most Gracious
O Most Merciful, O Most Generous
O Most Wise, O Eternal
O Most Great, O All-Knowing
O Most Forbearing, O Sound
O Self-Subsisting, O Everlasting
O Knower, O Ruler
O Divider, O Sound
O Majestic, O Beautiful
O Trustee, O Guarantor

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman daʿāhu mujīb

translation.en: O He who responds to those who call upon Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine dua edene icabet eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman aṭāʿahu ḥabīb

translation.en: O He who loves those who obey Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine itaat edenin sevgilisi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman aḥabbahu qarīb

translation.en: O He who is near to those who love Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa biman arādahu ʿalīm

translation.en: O He who knows those who desire Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ رَجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman rajāhu karīm

translation.en: O He who is generous to those who hope in Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden umut edene cömert olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa biman ʿaṣāhu ḥalīm

translation.en: O He who is forbearing with those who disobey Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine isyan edene halim olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِلْمِهِ حَكِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ḥilmihī ḥakīm

translation.en: O He who is wise in His forbearance

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حُكْمِهِ عَظِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ḥukmihī ʿaẓīm

translation.en: O He who is great in His judgment

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿaẓamatihī raḥīm

translation.en: O He who is merciful in His greatness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī iḥsānihī qadīm

translation.en: O He who is eternal in His benevolence

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُشَاغِلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَنْ سَمْعٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yushāghiluhu samʿun ʿan samʿ

translation.en: O He whom one hearing does not distract from another
translation.tr: Ey bir işitme diğer işitmeden alıkoymayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَنْ فِعْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yamnaʿuhu fiʿlun ʿan fiʿl

translation.en: O He whom one act does not prevent from another
translation.tr: Ey bir fiil diğer fiilden alıkoymayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَنْ قَوْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yulhīhi qawlun ʿan qawl

translation.en: O He whom one word does not divert from another
translation.tr: Ey bir söz diğer sözden meşgul etmeyen

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَنْ سُؤَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yughalliṭuhu suʾālun ʿan suʾāl

translation.en: O He whom one question does not confuse with another
translation.tr: Ey bir soru diğer soruyla şaşırtmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ

translation.en: O He whom the persistence of the persistent does not weary

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ شَرَحَ بِالْإِسْلَامِ صُدُورَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: O He who expanded the breasts of the believers with Islam
translation.tr: Ey müminlerin göğsünü İslam ile açan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَطَابَ بِذِكْرِهِ قُلُوبَ الْمُخْبِتِينَ

translation.en: O He who sweetened the hearts of the humble with His remembrance
translation.tr: Ey zikriyle mütevazilerin kalplerini hoş eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَغِيبُ عَنْ قُلُوبِ الْمُشْتَاقِينَ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yaghību ʿan qulūbi'l-mushtāqīn

translation.en: O He who is never absent from the hearts of the yearning
O Ultimate desire of the seekers

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yakhfā ʿalayhi shayʾun fi'l-ʿālamīn

translation.en: O He from whom nothing is hidden in the worlds
translation.tr: Ey âlemlerde hiçbir şey gizli kalmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.transliteration: Yā mubdiʾa kulli shayʾin wa muʿīdah

translation.en: O Originator of all things and their Restorer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi başlatan ve iade eden

lines.transliteration: Yā musabbiba kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Causer of all things and their Ordainer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin sebebini yaratan ve takdir eden

lines.transliteration: Yā mukawwina kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Former of all things and their Decreer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi oluşturan ve takdir eden

lines.transliteration: Yā murabbiya kulli shayʾin wa mudabbirah

translation.en: O Nurturer of all things and their Director
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi terbiye eden ve idare eden

lines.transliteration: Yā mukawwira kulli shayʾin wa muḥawwilah

translation.en: O Shaper of all things and their Transformer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi şekillendiren ve dönüştüren

lines.transliteration: Yā muḥyiya kulli shayʾin wa mumītah

translation.en: O Giver of life to all things and their Taker
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi dirilten ve öldüren

lines.transliteration: Yā khāliqa kulli shayʾin wa ṣāniʿah

translation.en: O Creator of all things and their Maker
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi yaratan ve yapan

lines.transliteration: Yā qābiḍa kulli shayʾin wa bāsiṭah

translation.en: O Withholder of all things and their Expander
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi daraltan ve genişleten

lines.transliteration: Yā munshiʾa kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Initiator of all things and their Measurer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi inşa eden ve ölçen

lines.transliteration: Yā muṣarrifa kulli shayʾin wa mudabbirah

translation.en: O Disposer of all things and their Administrator
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi çekip çeviren ve yöneten

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He whose knowledge precedes all
translation.tr: Ey ilmi her şeyden önce olan

translation.en: O He whose promise is true
O He whose gentleness is manifest
O He whose command prevails
O He whose book is firm
O He whose decree is certain
O He whose Quran is glorious
O He whose sovereignty is eternal
O He whose grace is everlasting
O He whose throne is mighty

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Companion of the strangers
O Subduer of the enemies
O Raiser of the heavens
O Remover of affliction
O Beloved of the pious
O Intimate of the saints
O Treasure of the poor
O God of the rich
O Most Generous of the generous
O Most Munificent of the munificent

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Great in rank
O Eternal in benevolence
O Abundant in blessings
O Beautiful in expression
O Majestic in proof
O Exalted above all imperfection
translation.tr: Ey her türlü noksanlıktan münezzeh olan

translation.en: O Hearer of every complaint
O Witness of every secret conversation
translation.tr: Ey her gizli konuşmaya şahit olan

translation.en: O Rescuer of every drowning one
O Savior of every distressed one

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Present One who is never absent
translation.tr: Ey hazır olup asla gaip olmayan

translation.en: O Near One who is never far
translation.tr: Ey yakın olup asla uzak olmayan

translation.en: O Intimate who never alienates
translation.tr: Ey dost olup asla yabancılık vermeyen

translation.en: O Living One who never dies
O Self-Subsisting who never sleeps
O Eternal who never perishes
translation.tr: Ey daim olup asla fani olmayan

translation.en: O Everlasting who never ceases
translation.tr: Ey baki olup asla yok olmayan

translation.en: O Knower who is never ignorant
translation.tr: Ey bilen olup asla cahil olmayan

translation.en: O Self-Sufficient who needs no sustenance
O Strong One who never weakens

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: And I ask You by Your names, O Causer of causes
O Drawer-near
O Successive One
O Turner of hearts
O Ordainer
O Arranger
O Encourager
O Reminder
O Former
O Supreme in Greatness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of generosity and blessings
O Lord of grace and honor
O Lord of glory and grandeur
O Lord of covenant and oath
O Lord of might and nobility
O Lord of gentleness and unveiling
O Lord of security and pardon
O Lord of goodness and mercy
O Lord of strength and power
O Lord of pardon and forgiveness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa rabbu kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is the Lord of all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ إِلٰهُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ilāhu kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is the God of all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa khāliqu kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is the Creator of all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fawqa kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is above all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa qabla kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is before all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa baʿda kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who is after all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَالِمُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿālimu kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who knows all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa qādiru ʿalā kulli shayʾ

translation.en: O He who has power over all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ يَبْقَى وَيَفْنَى كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa yabqā wa yafnā kullu shayʾ

translation.en: O He who remains while all things perish
translation.tr: Ey baki kalıp her şey fani olan

translation.en: O He like whom there is nothing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْمَلِكُ بِلَا مُنَازَعَةٍ

translation.en: O He who is the King without dispute

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ بِلَا ذُلٍّ

translation.en: O He who is Mighty without humiliation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْغَنِيُّ بِلَا فَقْرٍ

translation.en: O He who is Rich without poverty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ السُّلْطَانُ بِلَا عَزْلٍ

translation.en: O He who is the Sovereign without dismissal

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الرَّفِيعُ بِلَا سُقُوطٍ

translation.en: O He who is Exalted without falling

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْحَفِيظُ بِلَا فَوْتٍ

translation.en: O He who is the Preserver without losing

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْعَلِيمُ بِلَا تَعْلِيمٍ

translation.en: O He who knows without being taught

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْقَوِيُّ بِلَا ضَعْفٍ

translation.en: O He who is Strong without weakness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ النُّورُ بِلَا ظُلْمَةٍ

translation.en: O He who is Light without darkness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ الْكَبِيرُ بِلَا كِبْرٍ

translation.en: O He who is Great without arrogance

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا عِمَادَ مَنْ لَا عِمَادَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā ʿimāda man lā ʿimāda lah

translation.en: O Support of those who have no support

lines.arabic: يَا سَنَدَ مَنْ لَا سَنَدَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā sanada man lā sanada lah

translation.en: O Pillar of those who have no pillar

lines.arabic: يَا ذُخْرَ مَنْ لَا ذُخْرَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā dhukhra man lā dhukhra lah

translation.en: O Treasure of those who have no treasure

lines.arabic: يَا حِرْزَ مَنْ لَا حِرْزَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā ḥirza man lā ḥirza lah

translation.en: O Refuge of those who have no refuge

lines.arabic: يَا كَنْزَ مَنْ لَا كَنْزَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā kanza man lā kanza lah

translation.en: O Wealth of those who have no wealth

lines.arabic: يَا رُكْنَ مَنْ لَا رُكْنَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā rukna man lā rukna lah

translation.en: O Stronghold of those who have no stronghold

lines.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ مَنْ لَا غِيَاثَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā ghiyātha man lā ghiyātha lah

translation.en: O Succor of those who have no succor

lines.arabic: يَا جَارَ مَنْ لَا جَارَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā jāra man lā jāra lah

translation.en: O Neighbor of those who have no neighbor

lines.arabic: يَا عِزَّ مَنْ لَا عِزَّ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā ʿizza man lā ʿizza lah

translation.en: O Honor of those who have no honor

lines.arabic: يَا مُعِينَ مَنْ لَا مُعِينَ لَهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā muʿīna man lā muʿīna lah

translation.en: O Helper of those who have no helper

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Knower of the unseen and the seen
O Lord of Majesty and Generosity
O Lord of bounty and blessings
O Creator of the Tablet and the Pen
O Maker of the atoms and the souls
translation.tr: Ey zerreleri ve ruhları var eden

translation.en: O Lord of might and retribution
O Inspirer of Arabs and non-Arabs
translation.tr: Ey Araplara ve Arap olmayanlara ilham eden

translation.en: O Remover of harm and pain
O Knower of secrets and intentions
O Lord of the House and the Sacred Sanctuary

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.
